title: SCP: Anomalies
description: This mod adds various SCPs that are usually rarely known by many people. This mod is also inspired by the SCP wiki and various Mods from the SCP Containment Breach game!
body: # Welcome SCP: Anomalies is a mod that adds most of the various SCPs that are usually rarely known by many people. This mod is also inspired by the SCP wiki, SCP Unity and various Mods from the SCP Containment Breach game such as Terror Hunt Mod, Ultimate Edition and many more. This mod also adds several other elements such as furniture, building walls and sliding doors and for this version the new SCPs available are: [View All SCPs Here!](https://rynnn45.github.io/SCP-Anomalies-Official/) 1. SCP-1176 - Mellified Man 2. SCP-1762 - Where The Dragons Went 3. SCP-650 - Startling Statue 4. SCP-409 - Contagious Crystal 5. SCP-689 - Haunter in the Dark 6. SCP-035 - Possessive Mask 7. SCP-457 - Burning Man 8. SCP-1057 - Absence of Shark 9. SCP-1507 - Pink Flamingos 10. SCP-1026-RU - Dark Ego 11. SCP-016 - Sentient Micro-Organism 12. SCP-023 - Black Shuck 13. SCP-098 - Surgeon Crabs 14. SCP-993 - Bobble the Clown 15. SCP-173 - The Sculpture 16. SCP-049 - The Doctor 17. SCP-939 - With Many Voices 18. SCP-682 - Hard-to-Destroy Reptile 19. SCP-066 - Eric's Toy 20. SCP-058 - Heart of Darkness 21. SCP-407 - Song of Genesis ### _**More SCPs will be added in future versions**_ ## Thanks to : 1. It's Afandi : SCP-1176 Model 2. Golden Bon : SCP 1057, SCP 1762 (dragon), SCP 1507 Models 3. Chypdo : Modeler, Texturer and Arts ## **License** "Content relating to the SCP Foundation, including the SCP Foundation logo, is licensed under Creative Commons Sharealike 3.0 and all concepts originate from https://scpwiki.com/ and its authors. SCP: Anomalies, being derived from this content, is hereby also released under Creative Commons Sharealike 3.0." ## **Other Informations**
